title: Pastellum
description: A perfect Pastel world for you to live in forever.
body:
# PASTELLUM!

Pastellum is a resource pack that aims to give minecraft a cute pastell 

![A mushroom plains filled with Mooshrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ae6473b7f50cd6f555646f102adcd828521760.png)

This pack is aiming to retexure and remodel every block, mob, and item to match a vibrant and kind tone. We're also working on our own original soundtrack!

![A Creeper walking through a densely vegetated Roofed Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a8553f48c8d33ac55403a587d06b4d45ca145ef_0.webp)

This mod is still a huge work in progress so it would mean a lot if you joined us in crafting together our perfect pastel world <3

![An Icespikes biome with a Snowy Village poking into frame, the landscape is illuminated by a young sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/321c966c0915d5627d51d0a353185c2a2907d857.png)
